previous_loop: Created and published the initial V13 LoopKit repository, then added practical use cases and a Start Here README path.
residue: The repository can be used after AI-assisted work
next_variable: Proof-of-use: test whether V13 LoopKit produces a useful next-loop decision on itself or one real completed AI task.

re_entry_capacity.notes: The repository can still be paused, edited, redirected, or tested with one user without losing optionality.

cap_or_recheck: Run exactly one self-application test. Do not launch publicly, automate outreach, add CLI/server/package setup, or claim product-market fit. Recheck after one real AI-assisted completion has been reviewed.
next_loop_command: Use V13 LoopKit on one real AI-assisted completion and record whether the gate output was useful, unclear, or too heavy.
